description: Generate or change an image using OpenRouter image generation

text.description: Text description of the desired image.

filename.description: The filename where the generated image will be saved.

model.description: The image generation model to use (e.g. 'bytedance-seed/seedream-4.5'). Defaults to bytedance-seed/seedream-4.5.

quality.description: Rendering quality. Providers without a quality knob ignore this. Default is auto.

aspect_ratio.description: Normalized aspect ratio. Overrides 'size' if both are given.

output_format.description: Encoding of the returned image. Default depends on provider.

background.description: Background treatment. 'transparent' requires an output_format that supports alpha (png or webp).

n.description: Number of images to generate (1-10). Default is 1.

images.description: Reference images to guide image-to-image generation. Provide filenames of existing images.
